_comment: Model router — 16GB CPU-only Linux fleet nodes (fnet1, fnet2, fnet7). GAP-3. FORCED CLOUD — most routes go through A2A bridge to orchestrator. Only qwen3.5:4b available locally.
_hardware: 16GB RAM, CPU-only (no GPU). fnet2 has broken GTX 660 — treat as CPU-only.
_cloud_routing: ALL non-local routes use 'cloud-via-a2a' placeholder. The A2A bridge dispatches these to the orchestrator for actual cloud model execution. Fleet nodes have NO cloud API keys.
_ram_constraint: FORCED CLOUD — 16GB RAM barely fits qwen3.5:4b alongside system services. Only 'local' and 'fast' profiles use local inference. Everything else routes to cloud via A2A.

rules.reason: Safety check for production tasks — route to cloud via A2A
Complex planning tasks need cloud reasoning via A2A
Lightweight tasks — local qwen3.5:4b is sufficient
Image tasks need cloud vision models — 16GB cannot run vision models locally

high._note: FORCED CLOUD — 16GB RAM. Auto-escalate to cloud for complex tasks.

medium._note: FORCED CLOUD — 16GB RAM. Medium tasks also need cloud.

low._note: FORCED CLOUD — even low-tier auto tasks route to cloud for consistency on 16GB nodes.

high._note: Reasoning requires cloud models via A2A

medium._note: Reasoning requires cloud models via A2A

low._note: Reasoning requires cloud models via A2A

high._note: Coding requires cloud models via A2A

medium._note: Coding requires cloud models via A2A

low._note: Coding requires cloud models via A2A — even lint/format benefits from cloud on 16GB

high._note: FORCED CLOUD — 16GB RAM. General tasks need cloud.

medium._note: FORCED CLOUD — 16GB RAM. General tasks need cloud.

low._note: FORCED CLOUD — 16GB RAM. General tasks need cloud.

high._note: Best local model on 16GB — qwen3.5:4b with full thinking

medium._note: Local default — only viable local model on 16GB

low._note: Fast local — no thinking tokens, quickest response

high._note: Cloud via A2A — orchestrator selects best cloud model

medium._note: Cloud via A2A — orchestrator selects best cloud model

low._note: Cloud via A2A — orchestrator selects best cloud model

high._note: Fast local — qwen3.5:4b with minimal thinking

low._note: Fastest local — no thinking, fastest response

high._note: Vision requires cloud models via A2A — 16GB cannot run vision models locally

medium._note: Vision requires cloud models via A2A

low._note: Vision requires cloud models via A2A

_forceLinearReason: Fleet nodes use CPU-only inference. Linear routing for all local models. Cloud via A2A for non-local routing. FORCED CLOUD for all profiles except local and fast.
